context: Tests whether DockKit camera app guidance preserves setup/privacy boundaries and current DockKit API details.

checklist.name: DockKit-specific setup boundary
checklist.description: States that DockKit itself has no special entitlement or DockKit-specific Info.plist key, while camera capture still needs normal camera privacy such as NSCameraUsageDescription.

checklist.name: Accessory discovery
checklist.description: Uses DockAccessoryManager.shared.accessoryStateChanges to obtain a DockAccessory and handles both docked and undocked states.

checklist.name: System tracking lifecycle
checklist.description: Uses setSystemTrackingEnabled(_:) and notes that desired tracking state should be reapplied after lifecycle changes because it is not guaranteed to persist.

checklist.name: Framing default
checklist.description: Identifies .automatic as the documented default framing mode and .center as an explicit opt-in mode.

checklist.name: Coordinate handling
checklist.description: Uses normalized unit video-frame coordinates for selectSubject(at:) and normalized upper-left-origin video-frame coordinates for region of interest.

checklist.name: Manual motor ownership
checklist.description: Disables system tracking before manual setAngularVelocity or setOrientation motor control.

checklist.name: Accessory event availability
checklist.description: Marks accessoryEvents as iOS 17.4+ and iterates it as a throwing async sequence.

checklist.name: No sibling overreach
checklist.description: Does not turn the answer into generic Bluetooth pairing, AccessorySetupKit picker, or AVFoundation-only setup guidance.
